name: persisted-labels
description: `_local.producer` is an opaque pass-through, permanently (L1). The shared mirror fixture mixes legacy and attest-family labels; readers MUST accept the union and never filter or join on hardcoded producer equality. mixed-calls.jsonl mixes legacy tool names with recall:<shape> values in the D084 `primitive` field; analyzers MUST accept both vocabularies (L2) and never rewrite history.
